title: More Wood Varients
description: Adds more wood types! [Log, Planks, Slabs, Stairs, Fences]
body:
Adds A few more varients of wood into the game!

This adds

Lime/Red/Blue Planks
Lime/Red/Blue Logs
Lime/Red/Blue Slabs
Lime/Red/Blue Fences
Lime/Red/Blue Stairs
Lime/Red/Blue Biomes

The Recipes are;

The Same Wood Recipes from Vanilla Minecraft
(You can craft the colored wood from other colored wood)
